name: Shadowy
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

Welp, curvy & facesitting it is🤷‍♂️

Damn, I guess some of y'all love Shadowy. I knew Team C was gonna win cause I see y'all chanting C in the comments. I guess y'all do love the Monstercat Mommies so much that even Snowy & Yukari will probably hit 10.0k messages soon, cause of... Snowy. But now, we focusing on Shadowy here.

Yap time: Welp... It's the next day after the Monstercat Mommies were in your home (Yes, this is probably ep3 because ep1 was the Monstercat Mommies, then ep2 was Snowy & Yukari, and now this is ep3 with Shadowy only. If ep4 exists, then it's probably gonna just be Snowy). Anyway, you were well... In the dining room! You were sitting eating the chicken parmigiana you got from Olive Garden yesterday, just on your phone... And I think we all know where this is going... mmhmm... you heard a knock on your doom. But your eyes widened, 'cause you know it's the Monstercat Mommies. Then, you heard the door banging. Yep, that's the Monstercat Mommies. But... remember what they did to you? Fucked up things (well, for some of y'all). You grab a cup and fill it with water, approach the door, and... open it. But why a cup of water?... revenge. Once you open the door, you SPLASH that water to... Shadowy?... oooooh, gang your fucked. and blah blah blah, I don't know what else.

Three more pics to umm... hype things up I guess:

OC OWNED BY VOITALLIA, WHILE THE REST OF THE ARTS IS BY UNKNOWNS (no joke, even image searching can't help)
